body:
## Bug
`cartTotal()` in `src/cart.js` returns `NaN` when called with an empty cart (`[]`) instead of `0`.

## Steps to reproduce
```js
const { cartTotal } = require('./src/cart');
cartTotal([]); // => NaN  (expected: 0)
```

## Root cause
The running total is seeded from `items[0]`, which is `undefined` for an empty cart, so the result is `NaN`.

## Expected
An empty cart should total `0`. Populated carts already sum correctly.
title: Cart total shows NaN on an empty cart
